text.str: THIS DOCUMENT CONTAINS VALUABLE AND CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION PROPRIETARY
TO RAFAEL. THE RECIPIENTS OF THIS DOCUMENT SHALL NOT DISCLOSE ITS CONTENTS IN
WHOLE OR IN PART TO ANY THIRD PARTY UNLESS OTHERWISE AGREED BY RAFAEL.
ALL DIMENSIONS ARE IN MILLIMETERS UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED.
ALL DOCUMENTS LISTED ABOVE ARE IN LATEST VERSION, UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED.
SAMPLING INSPECTION ACC. TO Z0 SQUEGLIA, INDEX VALUE 2.5%
100% OF THREADS MUST BE CHECKED WITH GO AND NO-GO GAUGES
PACKING SHALL PREVENT CORROSION AND PHYSICAL DAMAGE DURING PROCESS, STORAGE AND
EACH PART SHALL BE INDIVIDUALLY PACKED
